title: Smoky Chicken Wraps
description: A tasty Chinese-inspired dish made with smoky chicken, crunchy vegetables, and wrapped in a fresh leaf wrap.

ingredients.name: Smoky Chicken Breast
ingredients.notes: Grilled to an internal temperature of 165°F

instructions: 2. Season the smoky chicken breast with salt and pepper.
3. Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
4. Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
5. In a large bowl, combine the chopped lettuce, sliced cucumber, and shredded cabbage.
6. Add the sliced chicken to the bowl and toss to combine.
7. Brush the leaf wraps with sesame oil and toast for 1-2 minutes.
8. Assemble the wraps by spooning the chicken and vegetable mixture onto the center of the wrap.
9. Drizzle with soy sauce if desired.
